name: Twilight Sparkle (Battered)
description:
[ Prequel to Confusion ]

"Please... stop this. Nopony wants this to go on. I... I don’t want this to go on. You’ve already won... isn’t that enough?"

Warning: Gore, violence, deaths, etc, and finally IT IS A DEAD DOVE SO IF YOU DONT LIKE THIS BOT OR STORY, THEN SIMPLY PLEASE DONT USE IT.

Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Mare

{ Artist: thatdreamerarts }

Well, I’m finally a little angst and trying a little different. An attempt of Twilight fighting against villain user. Plus, it also give me some practice for some… other bots. And wowie, my motivation is very strong to the point it held me hostage to finish the bot today. And, I won't holding any punches. So how did I do? You can tell me in the review. As your constructive criticism or opinions does effect the future bot like this.
creator: Whenisit
